Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}If you don't eat quick at my place, my siblings'll pick everything clean.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, don't worry, your food's safe. Take your time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}That was almost a personal best for me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Oh, get this, {f 4 1}. I've got a race lined up at another school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}A coach from a big-time athletic college is gonna be there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Know what that means? If I do well enough, I might score a scholarship.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I get it... You do go to Gekkoukan. I guess a rich kid wouldn't understand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'd pretty much given up on going to college.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Then I heard about the chance for a scholarship, so you can imagine why I jumped on it, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I'm gonna win this thing and go to college![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}And maybe... this'll make my mom's life a little easier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Right... I guess we really do come from different worlds.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}You probably have a hard time relating to poor families like mine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}{f 5 13 18 5 115}Yeah, you're right. It's a relief to hear you say that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I always think how different things would be if my dad were still alive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}If he were here, my siblings wouldn't have to worry about whether or not they'd get to eat every day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Well, complaining won't accomplish anything. I'm just gonna have to try for that scholarship.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase is seriously[n]thinking about his future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase opened up to[n]me about his problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're getting closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Shoot! The sale on chicken is almost over, and it's my turn to cook tonight![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
